issues.detail: The instructions lack coverage of error handling and edge cases such as missing tokens, invalid message IDs, and exceeding message size limits.

scenarios.name: Express + ws chat server with JWT, rooms, and heartbeats
scenarios.rationale: Baseline attaches ws after upgrade and uses naive heartbeats while treatment authenticates during the HTTP upgrade with noServer:true, runs a two-step isAlive ping/pong, and has a proper RoomManager.

scenarios.name: FastAPI live dashboard with Redis pub/sub across 3 servers
scenarios.rationale: Both use FastAPI plus Redis pub/sub, but treatment subscribes per-room (room:{id}) with dynamic subscribe/unsubscribe, authenticates at handshake, and logs connection lifecycle.
